posts.text: 爬NGA精英第一页帖子名称日期和链接123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778from selenium import webdriverimport timefrom selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Optionsfrom bs4 import BeautifulSoupchrome_options = Options()chrome_options.add_argument("--headless")chrome_options.add_argument("--user-agent=some user-agent name")driver = webdriver.Chrome(chrome_options=chrome_options)driver.get('http://nga.178.com/thread.php?fid=310')time.sleep(3)html = driver.page_sourcesoap = BeautifulSoup(html)#for#rowX = soap.find(class_="row2 topicrow")#获取时间#time = rowX.find(class_="silver postdate")#time = time.get('title')#获取链接地址和标题#linkspan = rowX.find(class_="topic")#link = linkspan.get('href')#[s.extract() for s in linkspan('span')]#title = linkspan.find_all("a")#del linkspan['class']#del linkspan['href']#del linkspan['id']#title = linkspan.text#print (title)for rowX in soap.find_all(class_="row1 topicrow"): time = rowX.find(class_="silver postdate") time = time.get('title') linkspan = rowX.find(class_="topic") [s.extract() for s in linkspan('span')] link = linkspan.get('href') del linkspan['class'] del linkspan['href'] del linkspan['id'] title = linkspan.text print(time," ",title," ",link," ",'\n')for rowX in soap.find_all(class_="row2 topicrow"): time = rowX.find(class_="silver postdate") time = time.get('title') linkspan = rowX.find(class_="topic") [s.extract() for s in linkspan('span')] link = linkspan.get('href') del linkspan['class'] del linkspan['href'] del linkspan['id'] title = linkspan.text print(time," ",title," ",link," ",'\n')#linkTitle = soap.find_all(id="t_tt1_1")#for link in soap.find_all(id="t_tt1_1"):# print(link.get('href')) #print(link.get('span'))#print(link)#print(time)#print(title)#driver.close()
